RULING:
NO APPEARANCES ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING: DEFENDANT DENNIS J. AMOROSO CONSTRUCTION COMPANY and MARK BEAMISH WATERPROOFING, INC.'S Motion To Dismiss: DENIED. Prevailing party to submit form of order. (301/JLW/AC) Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar May-10-2004 Case Settled - Set For Crc 525 Hearing On Jun-15-04 At 10:00 A.M. In Dept 212
MINI MINUTES: This Cause came as assigned from the Presiding Judge Master Calendar for Settlement on the Record.
Commissioner Sue M. Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Lavon Granger.
Neil Eisenberg, Esq., and Michael Padway, Esq., for Plaintiff: Angel Castro, also present
James Parton, Esq., for Defendant: Dennis Amoroso.
Parties have settled and terms were read into the record.
Settlement in the amount of $125,000.00. One check in the amount of $72,000.00 to the Plaintiff and one check in the amount of $53,000.00 payable to Mr. Eistenbert, Mr. Padway and Mr. John Taylor (former counsel). In addition, Zeum Corp. will pays the plaintiff $5,000.00 and to be received no later than July 1, 2004.
Ms. Liberman to received her regular fees of 12.5%.
Each parties to bear own costs and fees.
Plaintiff to dismissed with prejudice.
All agreed to terms in open court. This matter is placed on the CRC 225 calendar for dismissal on June 15, 2004 at 10:00 a.m. in Dept. 212.
